title: A Meeting That Changes Shandora
description: Mont Blanc Noland arrives in Shandora and clashes with Calgara before the two men begin to understand each other.
scene: Across pages 18, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villager, Shandia warrior. Mont Blanc Noland arrives in Shandora and clashes with Calgara before the two men begin to understand each other.

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: Hurry up and offer your blood!

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: Spill your blood on the altar!

summary: Mont Blanc Noland arrives in Shandora and clashes with Calgara before the two men begin to understand each other.
